heading: Construction; effect on agreements
label: 1906 Construction; effect on agreements
text: This chapter shall not be construed as modifying or affecting any agreement between the Department of Education or any other department or agency of the United States and the Helen Keller Services for the Blind, Incorporated, or any successor to or assignee of such corporation, with respect to the Center.
notes: Amendments1992— substituted “Helen Keller Services for the Blind, Incorporated” for “Industrial Home for the Blind, Incorporated”.Pub. L. 102–569
amendments: Amendments1992— substituted “Helen Keller Services for the Blind, Incorporated” for “Industrial Home for the Blind, Incorporated”.Pub. L. 102–569
